sub_pixel_system.notes: Space flight simulator; sub-pixel precision not documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Space Flight (No Gravity)
special_mechanics.description: All flight takes place in space; the player does not encounter gravity or atmospheric effects. Movement is three-dimensional in a zero-gravity environment.

special_mechanics.name: Power Management System
special_mechanics.description: Player must balance power allocation between weapons, engines, and shields (when available). Some craft require additional power balancing for beam weapons (tractor beam or jamming beam).

special_mechanics.name: Shield System
special_mechanics.description: Advanced fighters have rechargeable shields that protect from damage and can be depleted. Player can choose shield balance between front and rear.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Systems
special_mechanics.description: Laser cannons and ion cannons for short range; missiles or torpedoes for additional range. Player can change firing modes (paired or alternating fire).

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Source is Wikipedia article which focuses on gameplay features and narrative rather than precise physics parameters. As a space flight simulator, traditional ground-based movement parameters (walk speed, gravity, jump) are not applicable. Game engine based on X-Wing with enhanced features like Gouraud shading and improved targeting systems.
